description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a combination of white and gray exterior walls. The front facade includes tall, narrow windows, a central arched double door with a 'Welcome' mat, and a prominent wooden grandfather clock beside the entrance. To the right, a glass-enclosed sunroom or porch with a flat roof extends from the main structure, offering a view of interior furnishings. The rear and side walls are mostly solid, with minimal window openings and a decorative geometric motif on one side. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, glass, and wood, with a spacious, open interior visible from above. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with subtle rustic touches such as the barn-style doors and clock.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with tall windows, a glass sunroom, and a central arched entryway accented by a wooden grandfather clock and barn-style doors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the glass sunroom, part of the main house, and a large blank wall with a single window and a decorative square.
description_view_1: Rear view with a mostly solid wall, featuring a geometric motif and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main entryway with double doors, tall windows, a 'Welcome' mat, barn-style doors, and a wooden grandfather clock.
description_view_3: View of the glass sunroom's exterior, highlighting its transparent walls and flat roof, with the main house behind.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of tall, narrow windows with large glass panels on the sunroom
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched double door with a 'Welcome' mat, flanked by barn-style doors and a wooden grandfather clock, no porch or steps
